prompt: Should Reveal charge for community access in v1?
method: constitution-bound expand simulation (same packs/contracts/evidence as forge expand-node; ANTHROPIC_API_KEY unavailable in eval VM)

nodes.label: Entitlements data model
nodes.details: Whether free or paid, define entitlements table now so future gating does not require feed rewrite.

nodes.label: Defer paywall enforce
nodes.details: v1 ship slice: no enforcement middleware; feature-flag entitlements only.

nodes.label: Access analytics hooks
nodes.details: Instrument join/activation events so paid decision later is data-backed, not vibes.

nodes.label: Free-to-paid migration
nodes.details: Plan migration: grant all existing members entitlement=community_home if pricing turns on later.

nodes.label: Authz stub boundary
nodes.details: Keep authz check points in API now; return allow-all in v1 to avoid retrofit debt.
